mapper.select: SELECT rv.view_id AS viewId, rv.user_id AS userId, rv.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_image_url AS productImageUrl, p.price AS price, DATE_FORMAT(rv.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS viewedDate FROM recently_viewed_products rv INNER JOIN products p ON rv.product_id = p.product_id WHERE rv.user_id = #{userId} AND p.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY rv.view_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recently_viewed_products ( user_id, product_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, NOW() )
